creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #11)
(...)

I found that devel/gnome-builder fails with:

src/plugins/git/daemon/meson.build:32:0: ERROR: Problem encountered: libgit2 was not compiled with SSH support

Tried to update it to >= 44.0 but libdex is needed and it is not ported yet, so I cannot test if recent versions fixes it.

I found a similar issue at arch linux: https://bugs.archlinux.org/task/46840

While there is no programs that depends on this one we could mark it as broken but I'm afraid that gnome team take it as a wrong move.

Anyway I will open a PR about it and link it here.

I'm stuck and need help!

Else, there is no changes: only 2 ports mark as broken with maintainer timeout and no upstream reply to open PRs.

Cheers
